data.description:
## Context / Problem
inbound_fields.py sits at the reconciler package root but IS Jira adapter code: it implements _map_jira_to_local_fields (inbound_fields.py:141-184), delegated by adapters/jira/backend.py:43-47, and lazy-loads adapters/jira/adf via the literal key at inbound_fields.py:24. It stayed at root during epic bbf1's S5 relocation for loader location-pinning reasons and is the single recorded exemption in the neutrality sweep gate. Physically relocating it into adapters/jira/ completes vendor-code residency.

## Approach
Move inbound_fields.py to adapters/jira/, update the loader/spec_from_file_location references and test patch strings atomically (the S5 recipe, change 905), remove the sweep-gate exemption, and repoint the delegate import in adapters/jira/backend.py. Rejected alternative: a re-export shim at the old path (S5 policy: no shims).

## Scope
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_fields.py -> adapters/jira/inbound_fields.py
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/adapters/jira/backend.py (delegate import)
- loader references + test patch strings (per S5 recipe)
- tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_neutrality.py (drop the exemption)

## Testing
Behavior-preserving move: full suite green; the neutrality sweep gate passes with the exemption removed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] inbound_fields.py resides under adapters/jira/ with no shim at the old path; all loader references and test patch strings updated — verified by the full suite collecting and passing.
- [ ] The neutrality sweep gate passes with zero exemptions — verified by tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_neutrality.py.
- [ ] make lint && make typecheck && make test green.
data.title: Relocate inbound_fields.py (the Jira InboundMapper implementation) into adapters/jira/
